subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter of the fifth of Ramadan 1327 was received and brought most welcome tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه پنجم رمضان سنه ۱۳۲۷ وصول یافت حوادث بسیار خوشی داشت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
